title: pilosella × obornyana subsp. drumensis
intro: Pilosella × obornyana subsp. drumensis, also known as Drum's Hawk's Beard, is a rare and endangered hybrid plant species native to Europe. It is characterized by its yellow dandelion-like flowers and has been traditionally used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Pilosella × obornyana subsp. drumensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
